name: Miglior Canned Dog Unico Pouch - Lamb 100g
description: COMPOSITION: Lamb 65% (lungs, liver), minerals. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Moisture 80%, Crude protein 10%, Crude fat 4%, Crude fibres 0,3%, Crude ash 1,5%. Without colorants and preservatives. Nutritional additives / kg: Vitamin E 7,5 mg, Vitamin B1 4,2 mg, Vitamin B6 1,0 mg, Biotin (Vitamin H) 43,7 ?g, Zinc (Zinc sulphate monohydrate) 5,0 mg, Copper (Copper(II) sulphate pentahydrate) 0,2 mg, Manganese (Manganous sulphate monohydrate) 1,7 mg, Iodine (Potassium iodide) 0,7 mg. HOW TO USE: The product is ready to use. STORAGE INSTRUCTION: Store the product in a cool and dry place
